narrative:
Chagrin Falls City has 3,480 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.9 percentage points.
